name: TeklaProgressBar
summary: The TeklaProgressBar class represents the common progress bar control for the Open API.

constructors.name: TeklaProgressBar
constructors.summary: Initializes the common progress bar control.

params.name: text
params.doc: The message to display in the control.

properties.name: Text
properties.summary: Gets or sets the current message text of the progress bar.

properties.name: Value
properties.summary: Gets or sets the current position of the progress bar.
properties.remarks: The value should be a number between 0 and 100.

events.name: CancelClicked
events.summary: The CancelClicked event is raised when the cancel button is clicked.
